mcp.label: MCP tools
mcp.prompt: Prefer configured MCP server tools for DB/data exploration when they are available.

shell.label: Shell commands / CLIs
shell.prompt: Use approved shell commands or database CLIs for DB/data exploration.

user-instructions.label: Ask for DB access instructions
user-instructions.prompt: Ask the user for DB/data access instructions before attempting exploration.

questions.label: Goal / desired outcome
questions.prompt: What outcome are you trying to achieve?

questions.label: Current state / context
questions.prompt: What is the current state, starting point, or relevant context?

questions.label: Scope boundaries
questions.prompt: What is explicitly in scope, and what should stay out of scope?

questions.label: Constraints / non-goals
questions.prompt: List any hard constraints, non-goals, or things that must not change.

questions.label: Definition of done
questions.prompt: What has to be true for this work to be considered complete?

questions.label: Risks / unknowns
questions.prompt: What risks, uncertainties, or open questions should be surfaced in the plan?

questions.label: Preferred implementation approach
questions.prompt: Do you prefer a specific implementation approach, pattern, or tradeoff?

questions.label: Need for research vs implementation
questions.prompt: Should the run stay research-first, or move straight into implementation once the plan is approved?

questions.label: Validation / testing expectations
questions.prompt: What validation, testing, or acceptance checks should the plan include?

safe.description: Read-heavy planning with minimal mutation tools.

balanced.description: Planning plus common implementation tools for day-to-day feature work.

full.description: All currently available tools in the session.

lead-planner.description: Synthesizes discovery answers, coordinates specialist agents, and produces the final execution plan.

research-exploration.description: Surfaces unknowns, traces relevant code paths, and isolates missing context before implementation.

implementation-planner.description: Turns the approved plan into concrete execution steps and implementation guidance.

validation-test-planner.description: Defines verification scope, risk-based testing, and completion checks for the planned work.

architecture-reviewer.description: Reviews the big-picture design, boundaries, and long-term maintainability of the proposed plan.
